visual_description: A bearded man in a striped sweater sits at a table, holding a sandwich and looking toward a woman. The woman with blonde hair, wearing a white collared shirt under a dark sweater, looks down and runs her hand through her hair. She appears upset, closing her eyes briefly and turning her head away as background diners are visible.
audio_description: The man chews and speaks while the woman sighs and talks quietly. Ambient restaurant noise fills the background.
